name: restore_metadata
title: Restore Metadata
desc: Repairs and normalizes document metadata for improved consistency, standards compliance, and accessibility. The preset fixes XMP metadata, detects or sets the document title using defined fallback rules, and applies the PDF/UA identifier.

actions.name: reset_metadata
actions.title: Reset XMP Metadata
actions.desc: Recreate document XMP metadata from scratch and remove all non-essential entries. The resulting metadata contains only the minimal set of properties required for PDF/UA compliance and available document information.

actions.name: set_title
actions.title: Set Title from First Heading
actions.desc: Set the document title from the first matching structure tag (typically H1).

actions.name: set_title
actions.title: Set Title from File Name
actions.desc: Use the file name as the document title when no title was detected in the document structure.

actions.name: set_pdf_ua_standard
actions.title: Set PDF/UA Identifier
actions.desc: Declare the PDF/UA conformance level in the document metadata.
